activities_projects.title: Large Exponent Evaluation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves ability to calculate large powers

activities_projects.title: Exponent Law Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Apply multiple exponent rules in one expression
steps: Apply exponent rules step by step

activities_projects.title: Power Comparison Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Compare exponential numbers with different bases

activities_projects.title: Unknown Exponent Finder
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands relation between base and exponent

activities_projects.title: Pattern in Powers
activities_projects.objective: Observe patterns in powers of numbers

activities_projects.title: Scientific Notation Activity
activities_projects.objective: Represent large numbers using powers of 10
steps: Explain the advantage of this representation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands powers of 10 and scientific notation

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Exponent Investigation
steps: Find examples of powers used in computing or science
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects mathematical concepts with real-world applications

activities_projects.title: Exponent Word Problem
steps: Create a word problem involving powers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies exponent concepts in real-life situations
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical reasoning and correct solution (10 marks)
